creator: asl@launay.org
text:
Le Fri, Dec 07, 2001 at 10:33:03AM -0800, David O'Brien a écrit:
> 	The stratum 1 NTP servers in sysinstall should be replaced with
> 	stratum 2 servers (and expanded to include more) from
> 	http://www.eecis.udel.edu/~mills/ntp/clock2.htm

Ok, complete patch including everything is below. Compiles ok,
works fine too. Apply to /usr/src/usr.sbin/sysinstall/menus.c

	Arnaud.

-----------------------------

--- menus.c.orig	Fri Dec  7 23:51:54 2001
+++ menus.c	Sun Dec  9 20:34:30 2001
@@ -1393,54 +1393,432 @@
 	"ntpdate_enable=NO,ntpdate_flags=none" },
       { "Other",		"Select a site not on this list",
 	dmenuVarsCheck, configNTP, NULL, NULL },
